caption: A man dressed in a loose-fitting, long-sleeved blue outfit and matching trousers performs a martial arts demonstration in a large, carpeted ballroom. In the background, a crowd of people is seated at long tables covered with red cloths, watching the performance. The room is illuminated by recessed ceiling lights and wall sconces. Starting from a standing position with his back to the camera, the man pivots his body and extends his right arm. He then lunges forward and to his left, sweeping a long staff across the floor in a wide, horizontal arc. By the final frame, he has completed the strike, landing in a deep, wide stance with his left leg extended and his right leg bent, holding the staff across his body as he finishes the movement.
